PackContext.description:
Context payload shared by slides.

Extra keys are allowed so packs can continue to pass arbitrary template values.

calculate.description: Deprecated alias for metrics.calculate; use context.metrics.calculate instead.
calculate.title: Calculate

metrics.description: Optional metric context bindings and scoping predicates.

PackContext.title: PackContext

PackMetricBinding.description:
Binding describing how a metric value becomes a Jinja variable.

Bindings may reference a catalogue metric (`key` + optional `variant`) or declare an
arithmetic `expression` over other metrics/aliases. When `alias` is omitted it is
derived from the full metric key by replacing dots with underscores.

key.description: Catalogue metric key (e.g., documents_verified) or dotted variant key.
key.title: Key

alias.description: Jinja-safe variable name exposed to templates.
alias.title: Alias

variant.description: Optional variant path appended to `key` when `key` is not dotted.
variant.title: Variant

calculate.description: Optional DAX CALCULATE predicates for this binding. Named entries default to DEFINE scope; use calculate.<name>.evaluate to apply a predicate around the measure in SUMMARIZECOLUMNS.

format.description: Optional formatting hint mirroring Praeparo format tokens.
format.title: Format

ratio_to.description: Optional ratio semantics for this binding. `true` ratios against the base metric inferred from the dotted key. A string value must be a catalogue metric key used as the denominator.
ratio_to.title: Ratio To

expression.description: Optional arithmetic expression referencing metric keys or aliases.
expression.title: Expression

override.description: True when intentionally shadowing an inherited alias.
override.title: Override

PackMetricBinding.title: PackMetricBinding

PackMetricsContext.description:
Metrics-only context for packs and slides.

This wrapper scopes DAX predicates to metric-context resolution without
affecting slide visuals.

calculate.description: Optional DAX CALCULATE predicates applied to the outer metric context query.
calculate.title: Calculate

bindings.description: Metric bindings resolved into Jinja variables.
bindings.title: Bindings

PackMetricsContext.title: PackMetricsContext

PackPlaceholder.description: Placeholder binding used by PPTX assembly.

image.description: Optional static image path for this placeholder, relative to the pack file.
image.title: Image

text.description: Plain text (optionally templated) injected into a named text shape.
text.title: Text

PackPlaceholder.title: PackPlaceholder

id.description: Optional stable identifier for the slide.
id.title: Id

context.description: Optional template context merged with the pack-level context.

visual.description: Optional visual reference; absent for non-visual slides.

template.description: Optional PPTX template identifier (TEMPLATE_TAG) used during deck assembly.
template.title: Template

placeholders.description: Optional placeholder map when a slide template contains multiple picture placeholders.
placeholders.title: Placeholders

image.description: Optional static image path when using a PPTX template without a visual.
image.title: Image

PackSlideContext.description: Context payload specific to an individual slide.

calculate.description: Deprecated alias for metrics.calculate; use context.metrics.calculate instead.
calculate.title: Calculate

metrics.description: Optional metric context bindings and scoping predicates.

PackSlideContext.title: PackSlideContext

PackVisualRef.description: Reference to a visual or an inline visual config plus optional slide-level overrides.

ref.description: Optional path to the visual definition relative to the pack file.
ref.title: Ref

type.description: Optional inline visual type or Python module path when embedding a config directly.
type.title: Type

filters.description: Optional OData filters applied on top of pack-level defaults.
filters.title: Filters

calculate.description: Optional DAX filters applied on top of pack-level defaults.
calculate.title: Calculate

PackVisualRef.title: PackVisualRef

ScopedCalculateFilters.description: Split calculate predicates between DEFINE and EVALUATE scopes.

define.description: Predicates applied inside adhoc MEASURE definitions.
define.title: Define

evaluate.description: Predicates applied around measures in SUMMARIZECOLUMNS.
evaluate.title: Evaluate

ScopedCalculateFilters.title: ScopedCalculateFilters

description: Root configuration for a pack composed of slides.

schema.description: Schema or contract identifier for the pack.
schema.title: Schema

define.description: Optional DAX DEFINE block applied to DAX-backed visuals.
define.title: Define

calculate.description: Pack-level DAX filters applied to DAX-backed visuals.
calculate.title: Calculate

filters.description: Pack-level OData filters applied to Power BI visuals.
filters.title: Filters

title: PackConfig
